_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use new words about things we are interested in and topics we study at school.

_source.w: We are learning to use new words about things we are interested in and topics we study at school.
y: Learning new words helps us talk about more things in more detail.
The more words we know, the better we can express our ideas.
Using topic words shows we are understanding what we are learning about.
eg: We learn the words 'ocean' and 'iceberg' when studying cold places and use them in sentences.
We use new words from our science topic when talking about animals.
We add topic words to our personal word bank and practise using them.
We select the right word from a picture bank to label something we learned about.
We use a new word from a story in our own conversation later that day.
We practise using words about our personal interests, like the names of different dinosaurs.
